evals.prompt: Starting a lead gen agency, first 3 clients, using Smartlead. How should I set up infrastructure?
evals.expected_output: Infrastructure plan with per-client isolation, dedicated domains, and warmup planning

assertions.name: client_isolation
assertions.description: Recommends dedicated domains and mailboxes per client — not shared infrastructure

assertions.name: dedicated_domains
assertions.description: Advises 2 outbound domains per client with 3-5 mailboxes each, separate from primary domain

assertions.name: warmup_planning
assertions.description: Includes staggered warmup plan with 2-3 week timeline before campaign sends

evals.prompt: One client got blacklisted and now other clients' open rates are dropping

assertions.name: cross_contamination_diagnosis
assertions.description: Identifies shared domain or shared IP as the likely cause of cross-client impact

assertions.name: domain_isolation
assertions.description: Recommends strict per-client domain isolation to prevent future contamination

assertions.name: remediation_steps
assertions.description: Provides remediation: pause affected client, check blacklists, provision new domains, re-warmup

evals.prompt: Build a repeatable onboarding process for new agency clients
evals.expected_output: Structured onboarding playbook with phases, checklists, and skill handoffs

assertions.name: onboarding_checklist
assertions.description: Provides a phased onboarding checklist covering infrastructure, campaign setup, and launch

assertions.name: skill_handoffs
assertions.description: References handoffs to related skills — /sales-prospect-list for ICP/lists, /sales-cadence for sequence design, /sales-integration for CRM setup

assertions.name: timeline
assertions.description: Includes timeline with milestones (14-21 day ramp from onboard to first campaign)
